title: dryopteris lineata
intro: Dryopteris lineata, also known as the linear-lobed wood fern, is a species of fern native to eastern Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris lineata include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting digestion, as well as having potential anti-cancer and anti-aging properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for consumption, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
